title: Through All My Days

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: From my earliest breath to this very day
You've been my shelter, my strength, my way
When darkness surrounds and hope starts to fade
You're the fortress where I'm not afraid

sections.label: Chorus
lines: My refuge, my rock, my constant praise
Through every season, through all my days
Let my voice rise up,
let my song proclaim Your justice,
Your mercy, Your holy name

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: They whisper I'm broken, they say I'm done
But in You my spirit has just begun
From youth You've taught me to trust Your grace
Now in silver years,
I'll seek Your face

sections.label: Chorus
lines: My refuge, my rock, my constant praise
Through every season, through all my days
Let my voice rise up,
let my song proclaim Your justice,
Your mercy, Your holy name

sections.label: Bridge
lines: When my strength is failing Your power remains
Through every trial Your promise sustains

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Let my life be witness to all who come
Of the mighty works that You have done
Generation rising after me
Will know Your faithfulness set us free

sections.label: Chorus
lines: My refuge, my rock, my constant praise
Through every season, through all my days
Let my voice rise up,
let my song proclaim Your justice,
Your mercy, Your holy name

sections.label: Outro
lines: My lips will shout for joy when
I sing to You
My soul redeemed, my heart made new
From morning light till the day is done
I'll tell Your story of victory won

epigraph: thou art my trust from my youth
